item.title: What’s a King Cobra’s Favorite Food?!
item.description: An educational look at the king cobra’s diet, exploring its natural prey and feeding behavior in the wild.

media:content.media:title: What’s a King Cobra’s Favorite Food?!
media:content.media:description: An educational look at the king cobra’s diet, exploring its natural prey and feeding behavior in the wild.

item.title: Observing a Rattlesnake in the Wild
item.description: A respectful wildlife encounter featuring a rattlesnake, highlighting safe observation and appreciation for nature.

media:content.media:title: Observing a Rattlesnake in the Wild
media:content.media:description: A respectful wildlife encounter featuring a rattlesnake, highlighting safe observation and appreciation for nature.

item.title: Observing a Lion Up Close
item.description: Chandler’s Wild Life shares a respectful wildlife encounter featuring a lion, highlighting observation and appreciation of animal behavior.

media:content.media:title: Observing a Lion Up Close
media:content.media:description: Chandler’s Wild Life shares a respectful wildlife encounter featuring a lion, highlighting observation and appreciation of animal behavior.

item.title: Milking Venomous Snakes Safely
item.description: A close look at snake milking and venom collection, highlighting careful handling and wildlife education.

media:content.media:title: Milking Venomous Snakes Safely
media:content.media:description: A close look at snake milking and venom collection, highlighting careful handling and wildlife education.

item.title: Kevin the Malaysian King Cobra
item.description: A look at Kevin, a Malaysian king cobra, one of the longest venomous snakes, measuring roughly 15 feet long

media:content.media:title: Kevin the Malaysian King Cobra
media:content.media:description: A look at Kevin, a Malaysian king cobra, one of the longest venomous snakes, measuring roughly 15 feet long

item.title: Observing a Mother Crocodile
item.description: A wildlife encounter with a mother crocodile, highlighting respectful observation and Chandler’s Wild Life’s focus on reptiles and nature education

media:content.media:title: Observing a Mother Crocodile
media:content.media:description: A wildlife encounter with a mother crocodile, highlighting respectful observation and Chandler’s Wild Life’s focus on reptiles and nature education
